ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Terminate Estate For Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Continued To Feb-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-28-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Lieberman for Joel Parsons.

Mr. Lieberman stated that he had trouble getting a hold of Mr. Parsons. The petition to terminate estate for lack of assets was added back to calendar on December 16, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel will file a declaration with foreclosure statements attached showing no assets. Status of the inventory and appraisal, etc. was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Continued To Jul-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lieberman for Joel Parsons.

The Petition to Terminate Estate was continued to July 22, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide foreclosure documents and for notice to the Heirs of the disclaimed Siblings.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Continued To May-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matt Wertheim specially appearing for Attorney Michael Lieberman on behalf of Leotha Hill.

Mr. Wertheim explained that Mr. Lieberman was dealing with a personal issue and that he asked for another month to file the Petition for Final Distribution. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Status Report was continued to March 11, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Continued To Jan-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lieberman for Leotha Hill.

Mr. Lieberman stated that the property was lost, that there are no assets in the estate and that he will file a Petition to Terminate Estate for Lack of Assets. The status hearing was continued to January 28, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was on for status of the Petition for Probate. The matter was taken off calendar based on non-appearance and multiple continuances over the last year.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Rhonda Aguilar, CSR 956. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Continued To Apr-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Lieberman for Leotha Hill.

The Court stated that several times the notes were faxed to counsel with no response. Mr. Lieberman stated that they believe the notes are correct and that they would be filing a motion. The Court instructed Mr. Lieberman to contact the Examiner and continued the matter to April 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR#11218. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
